name.description: Required. Resource name of the instance.

location.description: Required. Google Cloud region where the instance resides.

host.description: Output only. Internal hostname of the instance.

port.description: Output only. Port number of the instance.

state.description: Output only. State of the instance.

createdAt.description: Output only. Time the instance was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: Output only. Time the instance was last modified.

diskEncryptionKeyName.description: Customer-managed encryption key (CMEK) for the instance disk.

ipRange.description: IP range for peering with the customer VPC.

peeringCidrRange.description: Size of the CIDR block range for peering.
